_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: 31 December 2027: Timber produced before 29 June 2023 placed on the market on or after this date falls back into EUDR scope (Article 37(3) transition period ends).
prior.source_span: By way of derogation from Article 1(2) of this Regulation, the timber and timber products as defined in Article 2, point (a), of Regulation (EU) No 995/2010 that were produced before 29 June 2023 and placed on the market from 31 December 2027 shall comply with Article 3 of this Regulation.
